title: Zyx's Random Creation
description:
Do you think there are too many materials in the vanilla Minecraft that are useless to you? Do you think the vanilla equipment limit is too low?

Try Zyx's Random Creation! This mod has added some practical items to your Minecraft!
body:
Zyx's Random Creation (hereinafter referred to as ZRC) has added some practical (not necessarily) items to your Minecraft, such as lapis lazuli tools, obsidian tools, etc.

ZRC has also added tools made from the raw materials of some mods, such as using crystal matrix ingots to make equipment with Re: Avaritia, and using magenta matters to make equipment with Project Expansion (if the corresponding mod is not installed, a red font prompt will be displayed below the item).

There are also some enchantments added to the mod, such as experience drawing enchantments that allow you to drop experience when destroying blocks; Burst enchantment can make bullets fired by bows or crossbows have explosive effects; Heavy strikes can make the target weak and slow…

You can view the introduction of enchantments by adding Enchantment Descriptions mod.

Regarding the follow-up ideas for this mod, due to limited technical capabilities, the author will collaborate with some mods to expand the materials in the mods that cannot be used to synthesize equipment and tools, or to integrate existing materials with materials within the mods. Currently, the plan is for Twilight Forest.

This mod is made using MCreator.

(Note: The English translation of this mod is not yet complete)
